# Tidy Guys

> Tidy Guys is an owner-led commercial cleaning company in Nashville, Tennessee, founded in 2021. We serve offices, medical and dental clinics, retail and restaurants, post-construction sites, event venues, and property managers across Nashville and Davidson County.

## Business

- **Name:** Tidy Guys, LLC
- **Founded:** 2021
- **Headquarters:** Madison, Tennessee (37115) — Nashville metro
- **Service area:** Nashville metro and Davidson County, plus Brentwood, Franklin, Hendersonville, Mt. Juliet, Antioch, Madison
- **Phone:** (615) 955-TIDY · (615) 955-8439
- **Email:** info@mytidyguys.com
- **Website:** https://mytidyguys.com
- **Tagline:** We keep it tidy, you do the rest.
- **BBB profile:** https://www.bbb.org/us/tn/nashville/profile/cleaning-services/tidy-guys-0573-37327518
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM · Saturday 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM · Sunday by appointment · After-hours and overnight available for commercial accounts
- **Insurance:** Fully insured, Certificate of Insurance available on request
- **Slogan / Differentiator:** Owner-led, locally owned, same crew every visit, written scope of work for every account.

## What Tidy Guys Does

Tidy Guys is a **commercial cleaning company**. We are not a residential maid service. Our service lines:

- **Commercial cleaning** — umbrella program for any business space, with documented scope and recurring frequency
- **Office cleaning** — daily, nightly, and weekly cleans for offices, suites, and coworking spaces
- **Janitorial services** — for property managers, multi-tenant buildings, and facility teams
- **Post-construction cleaning** — rough, final, and touch-up cleans for general contractors and developers
- **Medical and dental cleaning** — clinical-grade disinfection for clinics, dental practices, urgent care; HIPAA-aware crews
- **Retail and restaurant cleaning** — front-of-house and back-of-house for storefronts, restaurants, bars
- **Post-event cleaning** — same-night and next-morning turnaround for weddings, corporate events, conferences, pop-ups, venues
- **Move-in / move-out cleaning** — empty-space deep cleans for office moves, suite turnovers, retail handoffs, tenant transitions

## What Tidy Guys Does Not Do

- Recurring residential / home cleaning (we do offer move-in / move-out cleans for residential transitions, but we are not a weekly maid service)
- Hood cleaning (we coordinate with hood-cleaning vendors but do not perform the work)
- Bio-waste / red-bag waste handling (unless specifically contracted)
- Pest control, lawn care, or landscaping

## Differentiators

1. Owner-led — the owner personally walks every new account, answers the phone, and is accountable for delivery
2. Same crew every visit, with backup coverage planned in advance
3. Documented scope of work — every account starts with a written checklist
4. Visit reporting — written logs and photo-documented deep cleans
5. After-hours, overnight, and weekend service available
6. Fast quote turnaround — most quotes returned within one business day
7. 100% satisfaction guarantee — re-clean within one business day at no charge if anything is missed
8. Eco-friendly products available on request
9. Color-coded equipment for medical settings to prevent cross-contamination
10. Locally owned — not a franchise

## Service Area Detail

- **Nashville core neighborhoods:** East Nashville (37206), Downtown, Germantown, the Gulch, Green Hills, 12 South, Berry Hill, Music Row, Wedgewood-Houston, SoBro
- **Other Nashville areas:** Inglewood, Lockeland Springs, Five Points, Sylvan Park, Belmont-Hillsboro, Donelson, Hermitage, Bellevue, Madison, Antioch
- **Surrounding cities:** Brentwood, Franklin, Hendersonville, Mt. Juliet, Goodlettsville, La Vergne, Smyrna, Spring Hill, Old Hickory, Nolensville
- **ZIP codes:** 37011, 37013, 37027, 37064, 37067, 37072, 37075, 37076, 37115, 37122, 37135, 37138, 37189, 37201, 37203, 37204, 37205, 37206, 37207, 37208, 37209, 37210, 37211, 37212, 37213, 37214, 37215, 37216, 37217, 37218, 37219, 37220, 37221, 37228

## Industries Served

Corporate offices, coworking spaces, medical and dental clinics, urgent care, property management companies, multi-tenant buildings, restaurants, bars, retail stores, boutiques, music and event venues, fitness studios, daycares, schools, churches, salons, spas, general contractors, developers, showrooms, warehouses, auto dealerships.

- **Get a free quote:** https://mytidyguys.com/contact.html
- **Phone:** (615) 955-TIDY · (615) 955-8439
- **Email:** info@mytidyguys.com
- Most commercial quotes are returned within one business day after a brief walk-through (in person or virtual).
